commit_message:
chore: rename extension from "Gemini Voyager" to "Voyager"

Address trademark complaint by removing "Gemini" from the extension
title, prompt manager UI, export footers, and all locale files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
